title: THE NUTCRACKER'S SECRET
description: A high-stakes whisper in the breezy terraces of Nutwood County. Someone knows where the golden acorns are buried.

scenes.title: The Whispering Orchards
scenes.description: An introduction to the heart of Nutwood County.

dialogues.speaker: Provincial Guide
dialogues.teaser: Nutwood's green heart powers the total Chocolate Era.
dialogues.text: In the rolling green heart of Nutwood County, Hazelnut Terrace Town doesn’t just grow crops; it powers the Chocolate Era.

dialogues.speaker: Provincial Guide
dialogues.teaser: Postcard views hide a restless market square.
dialogues.text: Cradled in terraced hills, the town gathers around a grand hazelnut fountain alive with trade.

scenes.title: The Basement Vault
scenes.description: Deep within the roots of the terrace, a secret is revealed.

dialogues.speaker: Shadow Paw
dialogues.teaser: Did you bring the map? The Bosses are watching.
dialogues.text: Look here. This isn't just a map of the grove. It's the entire County layout.

scenes.title: The Balcony Reveal
scenes.description: The true scale of the Nut Elevator is finally seen.

dialogues.speaker: The Great Nutcracker
dialogues.teaser: You thought you could hide from the laws of sweetness?
dialogues.text: You thought you could hide from the laws of sweetness?

scenes.title: The Golden Grove
scenes.description: Searching for the legendary crop foundations.

dialogues.speaker: Haze the Squirrel
dialogues.text: The light is different here. It feels like the ground itself is breathing sweetness.

scenes.title: The Shadow Market
scenes.description: Trading whispers in the dark corners of the square.

dialogues.speaker: The Whisperer
dialogues.teaser: The economy isn't built on nuts alone.
dialogues.text: The economy isn't built on nuts alone, traveler. It's built on who knows who is hungry.

scenes.title: Terrace Turmoil
scenes.description: The Bosses exert their influence over the harvest.

dialogues.speaker: Clan Rebel
dialogues.text: The Bosses think they own the sun because they own the silos. We say the sweetness belongs to the terrace!

scenes.title: The Nut Elevator
scenes.description: Witnessing the massive vertical transport system.

dialogues.speaker: Engineer Oak
dialogues.text: She's at full capacity tonight. Every nut is a ticket to Toffee Town.

dialogues.speaker: Boatman Barley
dialogues.text: Keep your head down. The water has ears, and the Bosses have boats.

scenes.title: The Vault Entrance
scenes.description: Cracking the code of the Hazelnut Foundation.

dialogues.speaker: Shadow Paw
dialogues.text: One more click and the history of this town changes forever.

scenes.title: The Great Reveal
scenes.description: The hidden hoard of the Nutcracker is found.

dialogues.speaker: The Great Nutcracker
dialogues.text: You've finally arrived. But knowing the secret is only half the battle.

scenes.title: Conclusion of Whispers
scenes.description: The Terrace returns to its sunlit quiet, for now.

dialogues.speaker: Provincial Guide
dialogues.teaser: The story rests, but the roots remain.
dialogues.text: The story rests, but the roots remain. Hazelnut Terrace continues to power the world's sweetness.
